name: Groww Liquid Fund

key_facts.Current NAV: The Current Net Asset Value of the Groww Liquid Fund - Direct Plan as of Jul 13, 2026 is Rs 2,725.28 for Growth option of its Direct plan.
key_facts.Fund Size: The Groww Liquid Fund - Direct Plan currently holds Assets under Management worth of Rs 279.27 crore as on Jun 30, 2026.
key_facts.Expense ratio: The expense ratio of the fund is 0.11% for Direct plan as on Jun 30, 2026.
key_facts.Exit Load: Groww Liquid Fund - Direct Plan shall attract an Exit Load, "Exit load of 0.0070% if redeemed within 1 day, 0.0065% if redeemed within 2 days, 0.0060% if redeemed within 3 days, 0.0055% if redeemed within 4 days, 0.0050% if redeemed within 5 days, 0.0045% if redeemed within 6 days."
key_facts.Minimum Investment: Minimum investment required is Rs 500 and minimum additional investment is Rs 500. Minimum SIP investment is Rs 500.

performance.Trailing/Category Returns: Its trailing returns over different time periods are: 6.37% (1yr), 7.01% (3yr), 6.13% (5yr) and 6.81% (since launch). Whereas, Category returns for the same time duration are: 6.17% (1yr), 6.81% (3yr) and 6.07% (5yr).

objective: Investment Objective - The scheme seeks to provide a high level of liquidity with returns commensurate with low risk through a portfolio of money market and debt securities with maturity of up to 91 days.
